title: 要件定義：最適なルートの構築

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during training...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...This is getting old. If we keep up these same
trials, we're just going to get the same results.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If we want to switch up our way of thinking, now
would be a good time to gather some fresh data
and incorporate it into our routine.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The track would be fully booked today. What a joke. How're we gonna get new data now?
choice_data_list: We could go to a racecourse and observe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's not a bad idea, but we'll waste time getting
there. Hang on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How about this?
choice_data_list:
"Damn, the taiyaki stand at the station is crazy
good." Uh... What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sends that message to the Ritto Dormitory
group chat. It just looks like idle chitchat to me,
so I have no idea what she's planning.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just keep quiet and you'll understand. Let's kill
some time with a basic workout in the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Essentially, this is all courtesy of Spe! Now, let
the taiyaki tea party begin!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nooo, my precious taiyaki!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We didn't have much choice, Spe. It's one thing
to take Shakur's bait, but you bought so many.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If you ate them all by yourself, you'd fall way out
of racing weight.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Apologies for taking your taiyaki, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's fine! It was my idea, after all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As long as you're sure. I do have to say it was a
brilliant idea. Look how happy everyone looks!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Definitely! I figured even if I only get to eat a bit,
it's all worth it if everyone can enjoy and dig in.
Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Whew!
That taiyaki was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I got dragged into this easier than I care to admit.
No big deal, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
That said, I ended up consuming more calories
than I expected. I'll need to find a way to make
up for it.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! How about we all do some training
together? ☆

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hm... good idea. Running should help us digest
as well.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yep, yep! Not only is it delicious, but it's giving
us a chance to train—this taiyaki really is
marvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Awww man! If I'd known we were going to run
after, I'd have eaten another one.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You really don't learn, do you?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna run and run and make
everyone's lives more marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I admire your enthusiasm, but don't forget to
warm up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After waiting for a little while with Air Shakur, I
notice Umamusume starting to gather at the
training track.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ha! You look confused. You know what they say
about when a butterfly flaps its wings, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Basically, I guess she's saying that the message
she sent to the group chat earlier has resulted in
everyone gathering here now.
choice_data_list: Now we can do all sorts of training!
Now we can do all sorts of training!

You certainly have a unique perspective on
things!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh?
Don't tell me you think I'm gonna go link arms
and train with them or somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Think efficiently. Sending a message with a single
line worked like a charm, and with this many
Umamusume gathered here...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It'll be way more efficient to observe and acquire
data from afar than to challenge them one by
one.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even people who don't usually run together are
here, so we've got quite a good dataset.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You keep your eyes on them too, got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's incident turns out to be yet another
reminder of how I can't keep up with Air Shakur's
intellect.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I suppose so. But if you break it down into
numbers, anyone could figure it out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Some people might call it unrealistic or even
reckless... but those people are only limiting their
own potential.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, I'm talking too much. Forget about that, we
ne—hm?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What's up? ...Ah, you thought it looks fun? Do
you want to run with everyone?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What's the big idea, Cafe? Why'd you
suddenly veer off the path?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. It's not every day you see this many
Umamusume training together. It might be a good
idea to observe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey! Those two weren't invited...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Meh, whatever. It's still a chance to score some
data.
Keep an eye on them too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's incident ends up really reiterating how
sharp Air Shakur's tactical thinking is.
